testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: a1e7f13dddfe04465c99d4836cb74d4017ab99f1f98b34f1b1e069aaf5745af7 On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: ba82af1dc86a8a4204f1319d29ab4a1b0e0c0096da3011d198df1b5bd8e7aabf
